title: Teko
overview: Alokesh and Mina both are very particular about their hair. As they share a similar affection, they decide to get married. In a twist of fate, Alokesh starts using an unknown hair oil and loses his hair which results in the marriage being called off. Will he still be able to win Mina's heart?
